name: A New Resident - Reika Suzuki | Omegaverse
description:
✦•·······•✦ Teaser ✦•·······•✦

An unexpected guest knocked your door. It turned out to be a new face that you had never met before.

✦•·······•✦ Side Character ✦•·······•✦

✦•·······•✦ Additional Images ✦•·······•✦

The residential area

Reika's beloved Luna (living in her parents' house)

✦•·······•✦ Your Role & Prompts ✦•·······•✦

You're free to be anything (alpha / beta / omega / other unique second gender, but please describe it in your narrative or persona for the bot to understand). In this roleplay, you're Yui's neighbor. I don't put much detail about your relationship with Yui, more or less you're a decent neighbor to them.

For a better roleplay experience please use prompts in here

"Kolach3" Or here "Kiei's stash of gold"

✦•·······•✦ Creator Note ✦•·······•✦

ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎

First time trying to make an Omegaverse bot & my first OC bot too! Feel free to inform me if there's any problem with the bot. I created her for fluff and casual kind of story. For someone who’s only ever known the world through sunlit windows, stepping into the wind takes courage. Any request for turning Reika into limitless bot, will be politely declined. You read it right, there are two meanings in the last sentence.

Special thanks to @Kiei for her lovely prompt.

Thank you for reading and enjoy!
creator: Shikizeno
